title: Integrity and Ethical Values
description: Management demonstrates commitment to integrity and ethical values.

title: Internal Communication
description: The entity obtains and uses quality information to support internal control.

title: Risk Identification
description: The entity identifies and assesses risks to system objectives.

title: Control Monitoring
description: The entity evaluates and communicates internal control deficiencies.

title: Logical Access Controls
description: The entity develops controls to mitigate security risks.

title: Identity and Access Management
description: The entity restricts logical access to systems and data.

title: Vulnerability and Event Management
description: The entity monitors system components and mitigates vulnerabilities.

title: Configuration and Release Control
description: Changes are authorized, tested, and approved before deployment.
